title: A Difficult Choice
description: You have one bottle of clean water left and exams tomorrow. Do you save the water for later, or drink now to think clearly?

title: Gym vs Group Study
description: You can either attend a quick workout session or stay for one more hour of group revision.

title: Late-Night Cram
description: A friend offers energy drinks for an all-night study session before finals.

title: The Bottled Water Black Market
description: The campus convenience store is sold out of water. A student is selling a single bottle for $20 outside the library.

optionB.text: Walk 3 miles to a grocery store

title: The Desperate Lab Rat
description: You've been stuck in the biology lab for 5 hours. You are incredibly thirsty, but only the unboiled sink water is available.

title: Shower vs. Drink
description: You spent 45 minutes boiling and cooling a single large pot of water. You smell terrible, but you are also parched.

title: The Charity Drive
description: A student group is raising money for clean water initiatives. You want to help, but you have a massive essay due in two hours.

title: The Tainted Salad
description: The dining hall accidentally washed the lettuce with unboiled tap water. Your stomach is in absolutely agonizing pain.

optionA.text: Sleep it off in the dorm

optionB.text: Chug medicine and take your test

title: The Taped-Off Fountain
description: You are hallucinating from thirst during a 3-hour lecture. The water fountain in the hall is taped off with a 'DO NOT DRINK' sign.

optionA.text: Tear off the tape and drink heavily

title: The Flaking Partner
description: Your group project partner hasn't showered in days, feels sick from dirty water, and completely bails on your final presentation.

title: The Roommate Betrayal
description: You wake up to find your roommate drinking the last of your carefully boiled, safe water.

optionB.text: Let it go, you don't have the energy

title: The Campus Blackout
description: A storm knocks out the power. You can't use your electric stove to boil water, and you can't see your textbooks.

optionA.text: Hike in the rain to a different dorm

optionB.text: Give up and go to sleep

title: The Rainwater Collection
description: It's pouring rain. You are incredibly thirsty and the campus water truck is delayed by 6 hours.

optionA.text: Put buckets out and drink the rain

optionB.text: Wait for the official water truck
